data.content: Resolved merge conflict in beat-detail-lightbox.tsx (kept HEAD's displayedBeatId with alias badge system over feature branch's simpler inline approach). Merged feat/df3a-alias-in-views into main and pushed. All quality gates pass: tsc clean, 1975 tests pass, build succeeds, no new lint errors. Alias field threaded through full pipeline: KnotRecord→toBeat()→Beat/WaveBeat/BeatDependency/CascadeDescendant→all 8 view components. Includes dep.type fix in waves route.
